criteria.name: Mermaid Syntax Validity
criteria.description: The Mermaid syntax in c1-context.md renders without errors when processed by mermaid-cli v10.0.0 or higher. Zero syntax errors permitted.

criteria.name: C4 Level 1 Element Completeness
criteria.description: Diagram contains exactly: 1 System (llm-switch), 2 Persons (Developer, Operations), and 7 Software Systems (Local Models Qwen, Local Models Nemotron, Frontier API (OpenAI/Anthropic), Nomad Cluster, Consul, Vault, Prometheus). Each element must be uniquely identifiable by its exact label.

criteria.name: Element Type Accuracy
criteria.description: Persons are rendered as rounded rectangles (circle or rounded box), System and Software Systems as rectangular boxes. llm-switch must be enclosed in a context boundary box. No element may be misclassified (e.g., Developer cannot be a Software System).

criteria.name: Relationship Specification Accuracy
criteria.description: Exactly 10 relationships present with these exact labels and directions: (1) Developer->llm-switch:'HTTPS API'; (2) Operations->llm-switch:'Deployment'; (3) llm-switch->Local Models Qwen:'gRPC/HTTP'; (4) llm-switch->Local Models Nemotron:'gRPC/HTTP'; (5) llm-switch->Frontier API:'HTTPS'; (6) llm-switch->Nomad Cluster:'Deployment'; (7) llm-switch->Consul:'Service Discovery'; (8) llm-switch->Vault:'Secrets Management'; (9) llm-switch->Prometheus:'Metrics Export'; (10) Nomad Cluster->llm-switch:'Health Check'.

criteria.name: Narrative PRD Reference Compliance
criteria.description: Markdown narrative contains explicit references to: (a) 'Developer Journey' section, (b) 'Operations Journey' section, and (c) 'API Backend Specific Requirements' section of the PRD. Each reference must include the exact section title as a phrase.

criteria.name: Internal Detail Exclusion
criteria.description: Diagram contains zero internal components of llm-switch. Forbidden elements: routing algorithm, self-learning module, database, cache, load balancer, or any sub-components. llm-switch must appear as a single black-box element.

criteria.name: Markdown Structure Compliance
criteria.description: File c1-context.md contains: (1) H1 heading 'C1: System Context' or equivalent, (2) fenced Mermaid block (```mermaid ... ```), (3) minimum 250 words of explanatory text, (4) no internal HTML or non-Markdown formatting.

criteria.name: Protocol Annotation Accuracy
criteria.description: All relationships to external systems explicitly label the communication protocol (HTTPS, gRPC, HTTP, Deployment). No relationship may lack a protocol label where one is required by the system architecture.

criteria.name: Adversarial Edge Case – Context Boundary
criteria.description: System (llm-switch) must be enclosed within a visible context boundary box. Failure to show the context boundary constitutes a failure of this criterion.
